transcript: We love JV! Hello, welcome here at Giga. We're here at the booth from Kobe Electronics, an American company who is doing tablets. moved to to Germany, or let's say they got into the German market, started with some very interesting tablets. So we have here a 9.7-inch Android tablet, comes with an ice cream sandwich, ICS 4.0 currently. is working on it it comes to germany by the end of march with um wi-fi bgm standard bluetooth with a very decent performance i have to admit i really like to play with it so i started to play a bit with this tablet you will see some close-up videos you can see i'll play with that tablet it's not that heavy it's even from the the feeling, it's even less than the iPad. It has some very interesting connectors for mini, HDMI, micro USB. You have the headphone. You have memory SD card. Yeah, actually, you know, I really like to work with the tablet. They also plan to have a 3G model. It's about June, July, they want to get out with that model. It's roughly 50 or 60 euros more, as they told me. You have to pay a bit more for it. But what you know, if you buy an iPad with 3G, you pay at least 100, 150 bucks more. Thank you for watching. me you have to pay a bit more for it but well you know if you buy an ipad with 3g you buy you pay at least 100 150 bucks more so it's a very interesting offer especially it's a 9.7 inch and you pay less than 300 euros that might throw out some guys of the market at least i'm sure about that so you know what see the-up, see this tablet, how it runs. I was really excited about it and I cannot wait to have it in my hands, in my studio to play with it. I'm Bernd, you're here at Giga. See you next time. Bye-bye.
